Headline: #90 Harlem Temporary Reroute near Harlem/Lake
ShortDescription: 90 Harlem buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Harlem/Lake, due to street blockage near Harlem/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#90 Harlem buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Harlem/Lake, due to street blockage near Harlem/Lake.

Southbound #90 Harlem buses will operate via Harlem, Chicago Avenue, Kenilworth, Lake, Maple and North Boulevard.

Northbound #90 Harlem buses will operate via North Boulevard, Forest Avenue, Lake, Kenilworth, Chicago Avenue, Harlem and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
